evidence.source_title: Sister of Murdered Iranian Nuclear Scientist Blames Revolutionary Guards
evidence.description: Haaretz and multiple other outlets identify Mahboobeh Hosseinpour as the sister of nuclear scientist Ardeshir Hosseinpour, who died in January 2007.

editorial_notes: Mahboobeh is Ardeshir's sister. She spoke publicly about his death in 2014, living in Turkey.
